content.fact_text: Inventory Repository implemented with transactional integrity, deadlock handling, and circuit breaker pattern.

provenance_data.behaviour: Implements inventory repository with row-level locking ('SELECT FOR UPDATE') and transactional retry logic for deadlock resilience. Employs circuit breakers for database safety and Zod for runtime schema validation.
provenance_data.utility: Provides ACID-compliant inventory management with high-concurrency safety and resilience.
